evals.prompt: Stitch의 Garage 화면을 UI Toolkit pilot으로 가져와줘
evals.expected_output: Plans or implements a UI Toolkit pilot without touching the existing runtime Garage prefab, and records UXML/USS, preview scene, capture, report, and scoped validation evidence.

evals.prompt: 이 Stitch 화면을 실제 Lobby runtime에 교체 적용해줘
evals.expected_output: Separates pilot work from active runtime replacement, locks target/binding/acceptance/capture requirements first, and avoids reporting replacement success before runtime evidence exists.

evals.prompt: 현재 가져온 UI가 SetB와 같은지 리뷰해줘
evals.expected_output: Reviews hierarchy, density, preview completeness, persistent CTA, scoped workflow policy, and reports pilot success, runtime success, mismatch, or blocked without mixing mechanical evidence with acceptance.
